current_suggestion.pitch: Your philosophy and mental-models interests are currently covered through long-form podcasts (Lex, Huberman, ModernWisdom), but Conor Neill works a different angle: he translates Stoic and classical rhetoric principles into frameworks for decision-making and leadership, drawing heavily on Seneca, Marcus Aurelius, and Munger-style thinking. His videos are short to mid-length solo talks, typically 5-15 minutes, which means high density of applicable mental models without the interview padding. He covers topics like emotional regulation, how to speak and think under pressure, and what ancient philosophy actually prescribes for modern choices — filling a gap between your Stoicism interest and your mental-strength interest that none of your current channels address directly.
